description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front features a covered entryway with a black overhang, a driveway leading to a carport, and a manicured lawn with several trees and shrubs. Large windows are distributed across both floors, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor seating, and a grassy lawn enclosed by a white fence. The exterior is finished in light-colored siding, giving the house a sleek and contemporary appearance. The property is surrounded by a low fence, and the overall layout is spacious and well-organized.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a white fence and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a black overhang, driveway, carport, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, side yard, and partial view of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and large glass doors opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, trees, and the full length of the white fence enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a black overhang, single front door, small porch, and landscaped approach
